blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  W[Windows] --> C[Client]
  P[PWA] --> C
  A[Android] --> C
  C -->|HTTPS / Socket.IO| S[Local Server]
  S --> DB[(SQLite schema 8 + files)]
  S -. optional signed data .-> PC[Pulse Cloud]
  S --> R[Release provider]

alt.ru: Контекстная карта Nexora без персональных данных.
alt.en: Nexora context map without personal data.

caption.ru: Иллюстрация контуров Client, Local Server, Pulse Cloud и releases.
caption.en: Client, Local Server, Pulse Cloud and release boundaries.

caption.ru: ARCH-03 · Bootstrap, CSRF and Trust connection sequence.
caption.en: ARCH-03 · Bootstrap, CSRF and Trust connection sequence.

blocks.value:
sequenceDiagram
  participant C as Client
  participant S as Local Server
  C->>S: GET /healthz/live + /ready
  S-->>C: liveness + readiness
  C->>S: authenticated bootstrap
  S-->>C: session + CSRF scope
  C->>S: Trust status (3.2+)
  S-->>C: device/fingerprint state
  C->>S: authenticated Socket.IO
  S-->>C: scoped subscriptions

alt.ru: Обезличенное состояние URL, fingerprint и readiness.
alt.en: Sanitised URL, fingerprint and readiness state.

caption.ru: Проверяйте URL, Server ID, fingerprint and ready-state.
caption.en: Verify URL, Server ID, fingerprint and ready-state.

blocks.value:
flowchart TD
  A[Release asset] --> C{Classification}
  C -->|Signed stable| I[Install]
  C -->|UNSIGNED-TEST| T[Isolated test]
  I --> V[TLS/storage/update checks]
  V --> S[Installed smoke evidence]

caption.ru: Сравнение TLS, storage and update behavior.
caption.en: TLS, storage and update behaviour comparison.

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  E[Environment / secret store] --> V[Startup validation]
  F[Config file] --> V
  V -->|valid| R[Runtime]
  V -->|invalid| X[Fail closed + stable error]
  R --> L[Redacted logs/metrics]

caption.ru: Показывает validation state и restart impact.
caption.en: Shows validation state and restart impact.

blocks.value:
flowchart TB
  L[localhost Client] --> S[Local Server]
  V[LAN/VPN Client] --> FW[Firewall] --> S
  R[Remote Client] --> RP[HTTPS reverse proxy] --> S
  S --> DB[(SQLite/files)]
  S -. optional .-> P[Pulse Cloud]
